---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Pages / Components Affected
Which parts of the app would this touch? (e.g. Map Page, Profile, API)

## Mockups / References
If applicable, add wireframes, sketches, or links to similar features in other apps.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria one
- [ ] Criteria two
- [ ] Criteria three

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
